title: stevia lemmonii
intro: Stevia lemmonii, also known as Big-Leaf Stevia, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Stevia lemmonii include its potential to aid in weight management, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Stevia lemmonii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to make medicinal remedies and supplements.
